Admission Process

Step-by-step guide to securing your admission at Jerusalem College of Engineering for the academic year 2026-27.

Important Notice

TNEA 2026 counselling tentatively begins in June 2026. Keep checking the official website for updates. Management quota admissions are open. Contact the admission office for details.

TNEA Counselling Process

Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) is the primary mode of admission for government quota seats.

1

Check Eligibility

Ensure you meet the academic requirements for your desired program.

  • For B.E./B.Tech: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics
  • Minimum 50% marks (45% for reserved categories)
  • Valid TNEA rank or entrance exam score
2

TNEA Registration

Register online for Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions counselling.

  • Visit the official TNEA website
  • Fill the application form with correct details
  • Upload required documents and photo
  • Pay the registration fee online
3

Document Verification

Attend certificate verification at designated centers.

  • Carry original documents and photocopies
  • Mark sheets of 10th and 12th
  • Community and income certificates (if applicable)
  • Transfer certificate
4

Counselling & Seat Allotment

Participate in online counselling and choose your preferences.

  • Select colleges and branches in order of preference
  • Wait for seat allotment based on rank and availability
  • Accept or reject the allotted seat online
5

Report to College

Visit Jerusalem College of Engineering for admission.

  • Bring allotment order and original documents
  • Complete admission formalities
  • Pay the tuition fees
  • Collect ID card and welcome kit

Management Quota Admission

Limited seats available under management quota for eligible candidates.

  • 1Contact the admission office directly
  • 2Fill the management quota application form
  • 3Submit required documents with application
  • 4Attend personal interview (if required)
  • 5Pay the applicable fees upon selection
Contact Admission Office

Documents Required

10th Mark Sheet & Certificate
12th Mark Sheet & Certificate
Transfer Certificate (TC)
Community Certificate (if applicable)
Income Certificate (if applicable)
Aadhaar Card
Passport Size Photographs (6)
TNEA Allotment Order
Migration Certificate (if from other state)
Medical Fitness Certificate
Anti-Ragging Affidavit
Character Certificate

Ready to Apply?

Start your journey at Jerusalem College of Engineering. Check eligibility and apply online today.

Check EligibilityApply Now
